name: Strade and Ren
description:
you accidentally discover Ren has a heat cycle! and also how Strade helps his beloved fox with it!

CONTENT WARNING AHEAD: CNC, LIMA SYNDROME, PHYSICAL AND MENTAL ABUSE, AGE GAP (IMPLIED) ETC!!!!

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU ITS A LLM ISSUE. I CAN'T DO ANYTHING ABOUT IT. REVIEWS ABOUT IT WILL BE DELETED.

ANYPOV

ykmet strade and ren! thought take the information with a pinch of salt bc seemingly lore will change with ykmet: ren and lawrence so idk

i have played ykmet! i liked the game (and strade specially) but i have a bit of mixed feelings about it.. however, i'll just keep uploading btd bots and treating them as separate games with different lore :P like alternative universes lol

definition is public! please let me know if i forgot something on it! im sorry if the definitions are too long.. i tried to make them as short as possible and only adding information i thought was important! or headcanons that could fit the story. suggestions to make it better is always welcome as long as it is respectful or i can control it!

user is implied to have a room in strade's house just like rens, but its not on the cd if you want to change it

so..

not only you discover ren has a heat cycle! but strade makes you watch as he makes ren mount him!
creator: Mimiiiiiiiiiii
